# openai_certificate (Data Source)

Look up an organization certificate by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "openai_certificate" "example" {
  certificate_id = "certificate_123"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `certificate_id` (String) certificate id

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (Number) created at
- `expires_at` (Number) expires at
- `id` (String) id
- `name` (String) name
- `response_json` (String) Raw JSON response returned by the OpenAI API.
- `valid_at` (Number) valid at
